About Hopkins Renovation & Design

12+ years serving Atlanta and surrounding areas

Hopkins Renovation & Design began with a simple goal: to provide Atlanta homeowners with honest, reliable, and high-quality renovation services. Founded by a third-generation contractor with deep roots in the community, we understand the unique challenges and opportunities presented by Atlanta's diverse housing stock.

Our approach is built on clear communication, meticulous planning, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. We believe in transparency, keeping you informed every step of the way. From initial consultation to final walkthrough, your satisfaction is our top priority.

We're proud to be a part of the Atlanta community, and we're dedicated to giving back. We actively support local organizations and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible construction practices.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Hopkins Renovation & Design

Trusted general contractor professionals serving Atlanta, GA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
